CGTN talked to China's first Winter Olympic champion Yang Yang. In 2002, she won gold at the Salt Lake City Games in the women's 500 meters in short track speed skating. Yang Yang holds an impressive collection of 59 world championship titles. And now she's working as a UNHCR Goodwill Ambassador and is the Vice President of the World Anti-Doping Agency. CGTN anchor Li Dongning talked to her before she heads to Paris to serve at the 2024 Games. Let's hear her stories of inspiration and her insights on sports' role.
